title: epipactis atrorubens subvar. viridiflora
intro: Epipactis atrorubens subvar. viridiflora, also known as the dark-red Helleborine, is a type of orchid that belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Epipactis atrorubens subvar. viridiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
